name: Femm
description:
From Color Cruelty

I felt like making this one. She's pretty cool. This Femm is not to be confused with that.. Ski-Femm-bidi you see in Skibludi's Challenge. Blud Obby isn't canon at all here, actually.

I had to do research on Color Cruelty to really make this bot, but I also mixed it with The Battle Bricks knowledge, from what I saw in the scrapped Chapter 2 Section 2 map and Chapter 5 Section 1 map.

That's all, goodbye!
